    ageUp() - Method in class simcli.entities.actors.Sim

    CareerManager - Class in simcli.entities.managers
    Manages a Sim's employment state: current job, tier/promotion level, shift tracking, truancy detection, and daily resets.
    CareerManager() - Constructor for class simcli.entities.managers.CareerManager
    Constructs a new CareerManager with the Sim starting as Job.UNEMPLOYED at tier 1.

    Constructs a new CareerManager with a pre-assigned career.
    changeJob(Job, String) - Method in class simcli.entities.managers.CareerManager
    Switches the Sim to a new career, resetting tier and attendance counters.

    Represents the overarching Happiness metric for a Sim.

    Constructor
    HAPPINESS_BASE_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base rate at which happiness decays per tick.
    HAPPINESS_BONUS - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base bonus for happiness during positive social interactions.
    HAPPINESS_ENERGY_PENALTY_AMOUNT - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Amount of energy penalty applied when happiness is too low.
    HAPPINESS_PENALTY_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Happiness level below which an energy penalty is applied.
    HARDWARE_TECHNICIAN - Enum constant in enum class simcli.entities.models.Job
    Hands-on technical work with higher energy drain.
    hasTrait(Trait) - Method in class simcli.entities.actors.Sim
    Checks whether the Sim possesses the given trait.

    hasWarnedAboutOverwork() - Method in class simcli.entities.managers.CareerManager
    Returns whether the overwork warning has been displayed this cycle.
    HEALTH_ACCELERATED_DAMAGE_MULTIPLIER - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Multiplier for health damage when multiple needs are critical.
    HEALTH_ADDED_DAMAGE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Additional static health damage per tick under toxic conditions.
    HEALTH_BASE_DAMAGE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base amount of health lost when critical needs (hunger/energy) are empty.
    HEALTH_REGENERATION_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Rate at which health is restored when all needs are satisfied.
    HEALTHY - Enum constant in enum class simcli.entities.models.SimState
    Sim is well, fed, rested, and capable of all actions.

    Hunger - Class in simcli.needs
    Represents the immediate dietary requirements of a Sim.
    Hunger() - Constructor for class simcli.needs.Hunger
    Constructs a Hunger need instance with a base decay of 5.
    HUNGER_ACCELERATED_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Higher decay rate for hunger under certain conditions.
    HUNGER_BASE_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base rate at which hunger decays per tick.
    HUNGER_DECELERATED_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Lower decay rate for hunger (unused or state-dependent).
    HUNGER_WARNING_LEVEL - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    The level below which a hunger warning is displayed to the user.
    HUNGRY - Enum constant in enum class simcli.entities.models.SimState
    Sim's hunger is low; they must seek food.
    Hygiene - Class in simcli.needs
    Represents the Hygiene component for the Sim.
    Hygiene() - Constructor for class simcli.needs.Hygiene
    Core hygiene constructor.
    HYGIENE_ACCELERATED_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Higher decay rate for hygiene (e.g., after working or exercising).
    HYGIENE_BASE_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base rate at which hygiene decays per tick.
    HYGIENE_PENALTY_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Hygiene level below which a relationship/social penalty is applied.
    HYGIENE_SOCIAL_PENALTY_AMOUNT - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Amount of social penalty applied when hygiene is too low.

    L

    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.BaseCommand
    Hook method — each concrete command puts its actual logic here.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.CharacterStatusCommand
    Prints the full character status and waits for the user to press ENTER.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.HouseInfoCommand
    Prints the room layout and furniture of the current residential building.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.InteractCommand
    Executes the interaction by calling the selected item's interact method.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.InventoryCommand
    Runs the interactive inventory management loop.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.JobMarketCommand
    Presents the job selection menu and processes the player's choice.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.MoveRoomCommand
    Presents the room selection menu and moves the Sim if valid.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.SpouseInteractionCommand
    Presents the marriage interaction menu (date, have baby, feed babies).
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.SwitchSimCommand
    Displays the household roster and switches control to the selected Sim.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.TravelCommand
    Presents the destination menu, handles optional property purchase, and moves the player to the selected building.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.UpgradeRoomCommand
    Presents the room upgrade menu and processes the purchase.
    run() - Method in class simcli.engine.commands.WorkCommand
    Validates work preconditions (employment, age, hunger, weekday) and executes a work shift.
    run(Scanner) - Method in class simcli.engine.GameEngine
    Runs the main game loop until the player saves-and-exits or all Sims die.

    Sim - Class in simcli.entities.actors
    The core actor in the simulation — a virtual person with needs, a career, an inventory, relationships, and a lifecycle governed by the State Pattern.

    Constructs a new Sim with starting money, a random trait, and an appropriate life stage based on age.

    Constructs a new Sim with a pre-assigned career.

    sleep(int) - Method in class simcli.entities.actors.Sim
    Puts this Sim to sleep, restoring energy and reducing hunger proportional to the number of ticks until morning.
    SLEEP_EVENT - Enum constant in enum class simcli.engine.CommandResult
    The Sim went to sleep — GameEngine should skip time forward to the next morning rather than advancing by one tick.
    sleepAnimation() - Static method in class simcli.ui.UIManager
    Displays a brief animated sequence of "Zzz..." to simulate time passing while a Sim sleeps.

    Specialised signal indicating that the Sim is going to sleep.

    Constructs a new SleepEventException with a fixed message.

    The Sim is asleep and restoring energy.

    Social - Class in simcli.needs
    Represents the Social isolation need of a Sim.
    Social() - Constructor for class simcli.needs.Social
    Constructor setting base Decay.
    SOCIAL_ADDED_AMOUNT - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Amount of social need restored by performing social actions.
    SOCIAL_BASE_DECAY_RATE - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base rate at which the social need decays per tick.
    SOCIAL_BONUS - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Base bonus for social need restoration during interactions.
    SOCIAL_ENERGY_PENALTY_AMOUNT - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Amount of energy penalty applied when social need is too low.
    SOCIAL_HAPPINESS_PENALTY_AMOUNT - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Amount of happiness penalty applied when social need is too low.
    SOCIAL_PENALTY_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    Social level below which a happiness penalty is applied.
    SocialAction - Enum Class in simcli.entities.models
    Represents the various social actions that a Sim can perform with another Sim.
    SOCIALITE - Enum constant in enum class simcli.entities.models.Trait
    Socialite Sims gain extra relationship and happiness from socializing (1.0x energy).
    SOCIALIZING - Enum constant in enum class simcli.entities.models.ActionState
    The Sim is socializing with another Sim.

    tick() - Method in interface simcli.entities.actors.ISimBehaviour
    Advances one game tick: decays needs and updates state.
    tick() - Method in class simcli.entities.actors.Sim
    Advances one game tick: decays all needs, applies cross-penalties, drains health if starving, and updates the SimState.
    tick(Sim, double, double, String) - Method in class simcli.needs.SimsNeedsTracker
    Processes one simulation tick: decays all needs, applies cross-penalties between needs, drains or regenerates health, and updates the SimState.
    TICK_FORWARD - Enum constant in enum class simcli.engine.CommandResult
    A normal action was performed — the game clock should advance.
    TICKS_PER_DAY - Static variable in class simcli.utils.GameConstants
    The number of simulation ticks that represent one full day.

    Re-evaluates the Sim's state based on current need values and updates it accordingly.
    updateState() - Method in class simcli.needs.SimsNeedsTracker
    Resolves value thresholds into strict Enum definitions sequentially.
    updateStatus() - Method in class simcli.entities.models.Relationship
    Re-evaluates the categorical status based on the current friendship score thresholds: 80+ → RelationshipStatus.ROMANTIC 50–79 → RelationshipStatus.FRIEND 20–49 → RelationshipStatus.ACQUAINTANCE 0–19 → RelationshipStatus.STRANGER
